sql_array: CREATE TABLE geom_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, geometry GEOMETRY, name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO geom_data (geometry, name) VALUES (ST_Point(10, 20, 30, 40), 'PointA'), (ST_Point(15, 25, NULL, 45), 'PointB'), (ST_Point(NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL), 'PointC');
SELECT id, ST_Zmflag(geometry) AS zm_flag FROM geom_data WHERE name NOT LIKE '%B';
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, extra_info VARCHAR(100));
SELECT g.id, ST_Zmflag(g.geometry) AS zm_flag, a.extra_info FROM geom_data g JOIN additional_data a ON g.id NOT LIKE '1%' WHERE zm_flag = 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id, ST_Zmflag(geometry) AS zm_flag FROM geom_data) AS subquery HAVING zm_flag NOT LIKE '0';
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_geom AS SELECT id, geometry FROM geom_data WHERE ST_Zmflag(geometry) = 2;
SELECT t.id, ST_Zmflag(t.geometry) FROM temp_geom t WHERE t.id NOT LIKE '5%';
UPDATE geom_data SET geometry = (SELECT ST_Point(99, 99, 99, 99) WHERE id NOT LIKE '1') WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY, description VARCHAR(255));

INSERT INTO edge_cases (geom, description) VALUES (ST_Point(NAN, NAN, 0, 0), 'Invalid Point'), (ST_Point(0, 0, 0, NULL), 'Zero with NULL M'), (ST_Point(1.7976931348623157E+308, 1.7976931348623157E+308, 1.7976931348623157E+308, 1.7976931348623157E+308), 'Max Precision');
SELECT id, ST_Zmflag(geom) AS zm_flag FROM edge_cases WHERE description NOT LIKE '%with NULL%';
